activities.name: Load Data into Price List Item

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT
    --TRIM(UnitNumber) AS UnitNumber,
    TRIM(ProductCategory) AS eet_name,
    TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_description,
	TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_category,
	100 AS eet_erpcompany,
	0 AS statecode
FROM dev.DimEquipment
WHERE ProductCategoryName IS NOT NULL
  AND ProductCategory IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(ProductCategory) <> ''
  AND CompanyNumber = '01DEP'
  AND DivisionID = '01DEP';

SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(DimID) AS eet_code,
    TRIM(DimDescription) AS eet_name,
	100 AS eet_erpcompany,
	0 AS statecode
FROM dev.DimFin3
WHERE CompanyNumber = '01DEP'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT                 
	TRIM(A.CustomerCode)		accountnumber
	, A.CustomerName			name
	, A.CustomerCity			address1_city
	, A.CustomerCounty			address1_county
	, A.CustomerCountry			address1_country
	, A.Fax						address1_fax
	, A.CustomerAddress1		address1_line1
	, A.CustomerZipCode			address1_postalcode
	, A.CustomerStateProvince	address1_stateorprovince
	, A.Telephone				address1_telephone1
	, A.TotalCreditLimit		creditlimit
	, A.[E-mail]				emailaddress1
    , 100						eet_extendcompany 
	, TRIM(A.CustomerCode)      eet_extendkey
	, CONCAT (TRIM(A.CustomerCode),'-', LEFT(CompanyNumber,2), '-',LEFT(DivisionID,2)) AS address1_name
	, Fax						fax
	, CASE WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN '0' ELSE 1 END statecode
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[Creation_Date]) AS createdon
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) AS modifiedon
	, CASE WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN '276040000' 
            WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Prospect' THEN '276040002' 
            WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Deleted' THEN '276040001' 
        END AS eet_accounttype
	, 1 as address1_addresstypecode
	, 'true' eet_soldtorole
	, 'false' eet_shipto
	, 'true' eet_soldto
	, 'true' eet_invoiceto
FROM dimcustomer A 
WHERE A.CompanyNumber ='01DEP' 
AND CustomerName NOT LIKE '%' + CHAR(26) + '%'
--and TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) > DATEADD(DAY, -30, GETDATE())

SELECT 
	'983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    'fc239d37-cff7-f011-aa23-6045bd00331b' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    '964cb55d-c300-f111-8406-000d3a31debd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
	--1 productstructure,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    ProductCategoryName eet_quipwareproductcategory,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true' WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false' ELSE 'false' END AS eet_neworused,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'Inventory' THEN '276040000'
        WHEN Status = 'Presold' THEN '276040001'
        WHEN Status = 'Rented' THEN '276040002'
        WHEN Status = 'Sold' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'Invoiced' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN '276040004'
        WHEN Status = 'Transfer' THEN '276040006'
        ELSE '276040000'
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    CASE      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Model' THEN '200000'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Attachment' THEN '200001'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Option' THEN '200002'      
        ELSE '200000'      
    END AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN 1
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Rental' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Demo' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Loaner' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('In Transit', 'Being Transferred') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Equipment Sale' THEN 4 
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Service' THEN 14      
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Held' THEN 15        
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    EquipmentSupplier AS BuyFromBP,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ModifiedDate) AS modifiedon,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    --[Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book currentcost,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    Price price,
    UnitDescription AS description,
    --LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    dimequipment E  
WHERE       
    CompanyID = '01DEP'
	AND EquipmentType = 'Model' AND Model <> '' AND SourceSystem= 'Intellidealer';

WITH RankedModels AS
(
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY TRIM(Model)
               ORDER BY ModelYear DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM dimequipment
    WHERE CompanyID = '01DEP'
      AND TRIM(Model) <> ''
      --AND EquipmentType = 'Model'
)
SELECT 
    '983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    'fc239d37-cff7-f011-aa23-6045bd00331b' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'false' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    '964cb55d-c300-f111-8406-000d3a31debd' AS pricelevelid,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_extendkey,
    1 AS productstructure,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    '200000' AS producttypecode,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(Model) AS description,
	Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
	CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    SUBSTRING(DivisionID, 4, 2) AS Division
FROM RankedModels
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT 
	'983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    'fc239d37-cff7-f011-aa23-6045bd00331b' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    '964cb55d-c300-f111-8406-000d3a31debd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
	--1 productstructure,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    ProductCategoryName eet_quipwareproductcategory,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true' WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false' ELSE 'false' END AS eet_neworused,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'Inventory' THEN '276040000'
        WHEN Status = 'Presold' THEN '276040001'
        WHEN Status = 'Rented' THEN '276040002'
        WHEN Status = 'Sold' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'Invoiced' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN '276040004'
        WHEN Status = 'Transfer' THEN '276040006'
        ELSE '276040000'
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    '200001' AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN 1
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Rental' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Demo' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Loaner' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('In Transit', 'Being Transferred') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Equipment Sale' THEN 4 
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Service' THEN 14      
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Held' THEN 15        
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    EquipmentSupplier AS BuyFromBP,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ModifiedDate) AS modifiedon,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    --[Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book currentcost,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    Price price,
    UnitDescription AS description,
    LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    dimequipment E  
WHERE       
    CompanyID = '01DEP'    
	AND EquipmentType = 'Attachment' AND ParentUnitNumber <> '';

SELECT 
	'983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    'fc239d37-cff7-f011-aa23-6045bd00331b' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    '964cb55d-c300-f111-8406-000d3a31debd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(StockNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    TRIM(Description) AS eet_fullname,
    Description AS name,
    Description AS description,
    '200002' AS producttypecode,
	DateAdded AS createdon,
	DateModified AS modifiedon,
    Price price,
    --LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(Division, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost,
    Cost AS currentcost
FROM      
    dimoptions E  
WHERE CompanyID = '01DEP'

SELECT eet_code,
       eet_name,
       eet_erpcompany,
       statecode
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRIM(DimID) AS eet_code,
        TRIM(DimDescription) AS eet_name,
        100 AS eet_erpcompany,
        0 AS statecode,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRIM(DimID), 101 ORDER BY DimID) AS rn
    FROM dimfin3
    WHERE CompanyNumber = '01DEP'
    AND DimDescription IS NOT NULL
) x
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(ProductCategory) AS eet_name,
    TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_description,
	TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_category,
	100 AS eet_erpcompany,
	0 AS statecode
FROM dimequipment
WHERE ProductCategoryName IS NOT NULL
AND ProductCategory IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(ProductCategory) <> ''
AND CompanyID = '01DEP' ;

SELECT                 
	TRIM(A.CustomerCode)		accountnumber    
	, A.CustomerName			name
	, 100						eet_extendcompany
	, A.CustomerCity			Address1_City                        
	, A.CustomerCounty			Address1_County                   
	, A.CustomerCountry			Address1_Country                
	, A.Fax						Address1_Fax                        
	, A.CustomerAddress1		Address1_Line1                        
	, A.CustomerZipCode			Address1_PostalCode                        
	, A.CustomerStateProvince	Address1_stateorprovince                        
	, A.Telephone				Address1_telephone1                        
	, A.TotalCreditLimit		CreditLimit                                              
	, A.[E-mail]				EmailAddress1     
	, CONCAT (TRIM(A.CustomerCode),'-', LEFT(CompanyNumber,2), '-',LEFT(DivisionID,2)) eet_extendkey
	, CONCAT (TRIM(A.CustomerCode),'-', LEFT(CompanyNumber,2), '-',LEFT(DivisionID,2)) address1_name                    
	, Fax						Fax                                                                                                                                     
	, CASE WHEN [CustomerStatus] = 'Active' THEN '0' ELSE 1 END statecode                                                               
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[Creation Date])    CreationDate                        
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) LastModifiedDate    
	, CASE WHEN [CustomerStatus] = 'Active' THEN '276040000' WHEN [CustomerStatus] = 'Prospect' THEN '276040002' WHEN [CustomerStatus] = 'Deleted' THEN '276040001' END AS eet_accounttype
	, 1 as address1_addresstypecode
	, 'true' eet_soldtorole 
	, 'false' eet_shipto
	, 'true' eet_soldto
	, 'true' eet_invoiceto
FROM [dev].DimCustomer                  A WITH (NOLOCK)                                              
LEFT JOIN [dev].FactCustCredInfo_V2_RT CC ON CC.CustomerKey = A.CustomerCode AND CC.CompanyID = A.CompanyNumber                                      
	WHERE 
	A.CompanyNumber ='01DEP' AND A.DivisionID ='01DEP'  
	--AND  a.customercode = '0000000132'
	AND CustomerStatus ='Active'
	AND a.customercode not like '?%'              
	AND a.customercode not like '.%'           
	and a.customercode not like ' %'           
	and CustomerName NOT LIKE '%' + CHAR(26) + '%'  
	and a.customercode in ( select distinct customercode from dev.DimContactByBusinessPartner)

SELECT 
	'E1E0CF64-61A9-EF11-B8E9-000D3A196181' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'FAC06D02-8BE7-4453-A542-21509C1CFAC1' AS defaultuomid,
    '0456FB13-F9AC-EF11-8A66-000D3A106B21' AS organizationid,
    'D287CEFE-9958-4FF4-B048-81816AAB20DA' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    'FE9D7169-7DBB-EF11-B8E8-7C1E524857A0' AS pricelevelid,
	'0456FB13-F9AC-EF11-8A66-000D3A106B21' AS organizationid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2)) AS productnumber,
	--1 productstructure,
	'0' AS statecode,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    ProductCategoryName eet_quipwareproductcategory,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE      
        WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true'      
        WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false'      
        ELSE 'false'      
    END AS eet_neworused,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE      
        WHEN [Status] = 'RENTED' THEN '276040002'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'SOLD' THEN '276040003'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'ON ORDER' THEN '276040004'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'TRANSFER' THEN '276040006'      
        ELSE '276040000'      
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    CASE      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Model' THEN '200000'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Attachment' THEN '200001'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Option' THEN '200002'      
        ELSE '200000'      
    END AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'RENTAL' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'DEMO' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'LOANER' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('IN TRANSIT', 'BEING TRANSFERRED') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'EQUIPMENT SALE' THEN 4      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'SERVICE' THEN 14      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'HELD' THEN 15      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    EquipmentSupplier AS BuyFromBP,
    [Purchase ORDER] AS PurchaseOrder,
    [Purchase Price] AS eet_purchaseprice,
    NULL AS PurchaseOrderDate,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, Modifieddate) AS modifiedon,
    NULL AS ExpectedReceiptDate,
    TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    [Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    NULL AS FinalDeliveryDate,
    NULL AS ApprovalDate,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    NULL AS Meter2Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book currentcost,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    NULL AS ConfirmedReceiptDate,
    Price price,
    ModelName AS description,
    LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2) AS Company,
    LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    [dev].DimEquipment E WITH (NOLOCK)      
WHERE       
    CompanyNumber = '01DEP'    
    AND DivisionID ='01-01DEP'    
    AND TRIM(UnitNumber) NOT IN (
        SELECT UnitNumber 
        FROM dev.DimEquipment 
        WHERE CompanyNumber IN ('01DEV')
    )
	AND EquipmentType = 'Model' AND MODEL <> '';

SELECT 
    'E1E0CF64-61A9-EF11-B8E9-000D3A196181' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'FAC06D02-8BE7-4453-A542-21509C1CFAC1' AS defaultuomid,
    '0456FB13-F9AC-EF11-8A66-000D3A106B21' AS organizationid,
    'D287CEFE-9958-4FF4-B048-81816AAB20DA' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'false' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    'FE9D7169-7DBB-EF11-B8E8-7C1E524857A0' AS pricelevelid,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2)) AS productnumber,
    1 AS productstructure,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    '200000' AS producttypecode,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(Model) AS description,
	Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    --TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
	CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer
	--,
    --LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
FROM dev.DimEquipment 
WHERE CompanyNumber = '01DEP'
      AND DivisionID = '01DEP'
      AND TRIM(Model) <> ''
      AND TRIM(Model) LIKE '%[a-zA-Z0-9]%'  ;

SELECT 
	'E1E0CF64-61A9-EF11-B8E9-000D3A196181' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'FAC06D02-8BE7-4453-A542-21509C1CFAC1' AS defaultuomid,
    '0456FB13-F9AC-EF11-8A66-000D3A106B21' AS organizationid,
    'D287CEFE-9958-4FF4-B048-81816AAB20DA' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    'FE9D7169-7DBB-EF11-B8E8-7C1E524857A0' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2)) AS productnumber,
	1 productstructure,
	'0' AS statecode,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE      
        WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true'      
        WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false'      
        ELSE 'false'      
    END AS eet_neworused,
    TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE      
        WHEN [Status] = 'RENTED' THEN '276040002'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'SOLD' THEN '276040003'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'ON ORDER' THEN '276040004'      
        WHEN [Status] = 'TRANSFER' THEN '276040006'      
        ELSE '276040000'      
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    '200001' AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'RENTAL' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'DEMO' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'LOANER' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('IN TRANSIT', 'BEING TRANSFERRED') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'EQUIPMENT SALE' THEN 4      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'SERVICE' THEN 14      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'HELD' THEN 15      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    [Purchase ORDER] AS PurchaseOrder,
    [Purchase Price] AS eet_purchaseprice,
    NULL AS PurchaseOrderDate,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, Modifieddate) AS modifiedon,
    NULL AS ExpectedReceiptDate,
    TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    [Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    NULL AS FinalDeliveryDate,
    NULL AS ApprovalDate,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    NULL AS Meter2Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    NULL AS ConfirmedReceiptDate,
    Price price,
    ModelName AS description,
    LEFT(CompanyNumber, 2) AS Company,
    LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    [dev].DimEquipment E WITH (NOLOCK)      
WHERE       
    CompanyNumber = '01DEP'      
    AND DivisionID = '01DEP'
	AND EquipmentType = 'Attachment' AND ParentUnitNumber <> '';

SELECT 
    'E1E0CF64-61A9-EF11-B8E9-000D3A196181' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'FAC06D02-8BE7-4453-A542-21509C1CFAC1' AS defaultuomid,
    '0456FB13-F9AC-EF11-8A66-000D3A106B21' AS organizationid,
    'D287CEFE-9958-4FF4-B048-81816AAB20DA' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    'FE9D7169-7DBB-EF11-B8E8-7C1E524857A0' AS pricelevelid,

	-- '983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    -- 2 AS quantitydecimal,
    -- 'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    -- 'fc239d37-cff7-f011-aa23-6045bd00331b' AS organizationid,
    -- '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    -- 'true' AS isstockitem,
    -- '0' AS statecode,
    -- '964cb55d-c300-f111-8406-000d3a31debd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(StockNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    TRIM(Description) AS eet_fullname,
    Description AS name,
    Description AS description,
    '200002' AS producttypecode,
	DateAdded AS createdon,
	DateModified AS modifiedon,
    Price price,
    --LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(Division, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost,
    Cost AS currentcost
FROM      
    dimoptions E  
WHERE CompanyID = '01DEP'

SELECT                 
	TRIM(A.CustomerCode)		accountnumber
	, A.CustomerName			name
	, A.CustomerCity			address1_city
	, A.CustomerCounty			address1_county
	, A.CustomerCountry			address1_country
	, A.Fax						address1_fax
	, A.CustomerAddress1		address1_line1
	, A.CustomerZipCode			address1_postalcode
	, A.CustomerStateProvince	address1_stateorprovince
	, A.Telephone				address1_telephone1
	, A.TotalCreditLimit		creditlimit
	, A.[E-mail]				emailaddress1
    , 101						eet_extendcompany 
	, TRIM(A.CustomerCode)      eet_extendkey
	, CONCAT (TRIM(A.CustomerCode),'-', LEFT(CompanyNumber,2), '-',LEFT(DivisionID,2)) AS address1_name
	, Fax						fax
	, CASE WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN '0' ELSE 1 END statecode
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[Creation_Date]) AS createdon
	, TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) AS modifiedon
	, CASE WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN '276040000' 
            WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Prospect' THEN '276040002' 
            WHEN CustomerStatus = 'Deleted' THEN '276040001' 
        END AS eet_accounttype
	, 1 as address1_addresstypecode
	, 'true' eet_soldtorole
	, 'false' eet_shipto
	, 'true' eet_soldto
	, 'true' eet_invoiceto
FROM dimcustomer A 
WHERE A.CompanyNumber ='01AHE' --AND A.DivisionID ='01DEP'  
	--AND A.CustomerCode = 'PALME029'
	-- AND CustomerStatus ='Active'
	-- AND a.customercode not like '?%'              
	-- AND a.customercode not like '.%'           
	-- and a.customercode not like ' %'           
	-- and CustomerName NOT LIKE '%' + CHAR(26) + '%'  
	--and a.customercode in ( select distinct customercode from dev.DimContactByBusinessPartner)

SELECT 
    TRIM(A.CustomerCode)        AS accountnumber
    , A.CustomerName            AS name
    , A.CustomerCity            AS address1_city
    , A.CustomerCounty          AS address1_county
    , A.CustomerCountry         AS address1_country
    , A.Fax                     AS address1_fax
    , A.CustomerAddress1        AS address1_line1
    , A.CustomerZipCode         AS address1_postalcode
    , A.CustomerStateProvince   AS address1_stateorprovince
    , A.Telephone               AS address1_telephone1
    , A.TotalCreditLimit        AS creditlimit
    , A.[E-mail]                AS emailaddress1
    , 100                       AS eet_extendcompany 
    , TRIM(A.CustomerCode)      AS eet_extendkey
    , CONCAT (TRIM(A.CustomerCode),'-', LEFT(A.CompanyNumber,2), '-', LEFT(A.DivisionID,2)) AS address1_name
    , A.Fax                     AS fax
    , CASE WHEN A.CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS statecode
    , TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[Creation_Date]) AS createdon
    , TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) AS modifiedon
    , CASE WHEN A.CustomerStatus = 'Active' THEN '276040000' 
           WHEN A.CustomerStatus = 'Prospect' THEN '276040002' 
           WHEN A.CustomerStatus = 'Deleted' THEN '276040001' 
      END AS eet_accounttype
    , 1 AS address1_addresstypecode
    , 'true' AS eet_soldtorole
    , 'false' AS eet_shipto
    , 'true' AS eet_soldto
    , 'true' AS eet_invoiceto
FROM dimcustomer A 
WHERE A.CompanyNumber = '01DEM' 
  AND A.DivisionID = '01-01DEM'
  AND A.CustomerName NOT LIKE '%' + CHAR(26) + '%'
--AND TRY_CONVERT(date, A.[ModificationDate]) > DATEADD(DAY, -30, GETDATE())

SELECT 
	'983A3ED3-D3D8-F011-8543-000D3A352AC1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7 ' AS defaultuomid,
    '87f51c15-74f0-f011-aa23-6045bd003931' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    -- '6da8bced-935d-f111-a825-6045bd0484dd' AS pricelevelid,
    '6da8bced-935d-f111-a825-6045bd0484dd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    100 AS eet_extendcompany,
	--1 productstructure,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    ProductCategoryName eet_quipwareproductcategory,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true' WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false' ELSE 'false' END AS eet_neworused,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'Inventory' THEN '276040000'
        WHEN Status = 'Presold' THEN '276040001'
        WHEN Status = 'Rented' THEN '276040002'
        WHEN Status = 'Sold' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'Invoiced' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN '276040004'
        WHEN Status = 'Transfer' THEN '276040006'
        ELSE '276040000'
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    CASE      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Model' THEN '200000'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Attachment' THEN '200001'      
        WHEN EquipmentType = 'Option' THEN '200002'      
        ELSE '200000'      
    END AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN 1
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Rental' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Demo' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Loaner' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('In Transit', 'Being Transferred') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Equipment Sale' THEN 4 
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Service' THEN 14      
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Held' THEN 15        
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    EquipmentSupplier AS BuyFromBP,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ModifiedDate) AS modifiedon,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    --[Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book currentcost,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    Price price,
    UnitDescription AS description,
    --LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    dimequipment E  
WHERE       
    CompanyID = '01DEM'
    AND DivisionID = '01-01DEM'
	AND EquipmentType = 'Model' AND Model <> '' AND SourceSystem= 'Intellidealer';

WITH RankedModels AS
(
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY TRIM(Model)
               ORDER BY ModelYear DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM dimequipment
    WHERE CompanyID = '01DEM'
    AND DivisionID = '01-01DEM'
      AND TRIM(Model) <> ''
      --AND EquipmentType = 'Model'
)
SELECT 
    '983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    '87f51c15-74f0-f011-aa23-6045bd003931' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'false' AS isstockitem,
    '0' AS statecode,
    '6da8bced-935d-f111-a825-6045bd0484dd' AS pricelevelid,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_extendkey,
    1 AS productstructure,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    '200000' AS producttypecode,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(Model) AS description,
	Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
	CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    SUBSTRING(DivisionID, 4, 2) AS Division
FROM RankedModels
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT 
	'983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    '87f51c15-74f0-f011-aa23-6045bd003931' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    0 AS statecode,
    '6da8bced-935d-f111-a825-6045bd0484dd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
	--1 productstructure,
    TRIM(UnitNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    Manufacturer AS eet_make,
    TRIM(Model) AS eet_modelcode,
    ProductCategoryName eet_quipwareproductcategory,
    TRIM(UnitDescription) AS eet_fullname,
    CASE WHEN Used = 'Used' THEN 'true' WHEN Used = 'New' THEN 'false' ELSE 'false' END AS eet_neworused,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, SalesInvoiceDate) AS eet_purchasedate,
    ModelYear AS eet_makeyear,
    CASE      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Dealer Owned' THEN 10      
        WHEN OwnershipStatus = 'Customer Stock' THEN 20      
        ELSE NULL      
    END AS eet_ownershipstatus,
    CONCAT(TRIM(Model), '_', Manufacturer) AS name,
    SerialNumber eet_serialno,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'Inventory' THEN '276040000'
        WHEN Status = 'Presold' THEN '276040001'
        WHEN Status = 'Rented' THEN '276040002'
        WHEN Status = 'Sold' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'Invoiced' THEN '276040003'
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN '276040004'
        WHEN Status = 'Transfer' THEN '276040006'
        ELSE '276040000'
    END AS EquipmentStatus,
    '200001' AS producttypecode,
    LEFT(ManufacturerName, 10) AS eet_manufacturer,
    TRIM(Model) AS ModelName,
    CASE
        WHEN Status = 'On Order' THEN 1
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Rental' THEN 3      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'In the Branch' THEN 2      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Demo' THEN 5      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Loaner' THEN 6      
        WHEN PhysicalStatus IN ('In Transit', 'Being Transferred') THEN 7
        WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Equipment Sale' THEN 4 
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Service' THEN 14      
        --WHEN PhysicalStatus = 'Held' THEN 15        
    END AS eet_physicalstatus,
    EquipmentSupplier AS BuyFromBP,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CreatedDate) AS createdon,
	TRY_CONVERT(DATE, ModifiedDate) AS modifiedon,
    --TRY_CONVERT(date, [Actual Receipt Date]) AS ActualReceiptDate,
    OriginalSalesPrice AS SalesPrice,
    --[Sales Agreement Customer] AS SoldToCustomer,
    Meter1Reading AS Meter1Hours,
    MinimumSellingPrice,
    Book currentcost,
    ParentUnitNumber eet_parentunit,
    CONCAT(UnitNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS ExternalID,
    Price price,
    UnitDescription AS description,
    LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    LEFT(DivisionID, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost
FROM      
    dimequipment E  
WHERE       
    CompanyID = '01DEM'  
    AND DivisionID = '01-01DEM'  
	AND EquipmentType = 'Attachment' AND ParentUnitNumber <> '';

SELECT 
	'983a3ed3-d3d8-f011-8543-000d3a352ac1' AS eet_businessunit,
    2 AS quantitydecimal,
    'b2f82e2d-98ab-46b5-9577-600f4567fcb7' AS defaultuomid,
    '87f51c15-74f0-f011-aa23-6045bd003931' AS organizationid,
    '7a222c89-e501-4949-a7bb-99ce64f9b6a6' AS defaultuomscheduleid,
    'true' AS isstockitem,
    0 AS statecode,
    '6da8bced-935d-f111-a825-6045bd0484dd' AS pricelevelid,
	CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS productnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber, '_', LEFT(CompanyID, 2)) AS eet_derivedproductnumber,
    CONCAT(StockNumber, '_', OptionNumber, '_', SequenceNumber) AS eet_extendkey,
    '100' AS eet_extendcompany,
    TRIM(StockNumber) AS eet_unitnumber,
    TRIM(Description) AS eet_fullname,
    Description AS name,
    Description AS description,
    '200002' AS producttypecode,
	DateAdded AS createdon,
	DateModified AS modifiedon,
    Price price,
    --LEFT(CompanyID, 2) AS Company,
    --LEFT(Division, 2) AS Division,
    Cost AS standardcost,
    Cost AS currentcost
FROM      
    dimoptions E  
WHERE CompanyID = '01DEM'
AND Division = '01-01DEM'

SELECT eet_code,
       eet_name,
       eet_erpcompany,
       statecode
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRIM(DimID) AS eet_code,
        TRIM(DimDescription) AS eet_name,
        100 AS eet_erpcompany,
        0 AS statecode,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRIM(DimID), 101 ORDER BY DimID) AS rn
    FROM dimfin3
    WHERE CompanyNumber = '01DEM'
    AND DimDescription IS NOT NULL
) x
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(ProductCategory) AS eet_name,
    TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_description,
	TRIM(ProductCategoryName) AS eet_category,
	100 AS eet_erpcompany,
	0 AS statecode
FROM dimequipment
WHERE ProductCategoryName IS NOT NULL
AND ProductCategory IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(ProductCategory) <> ''
AND CompanyID = '01DEM' ;

properties.description: load customer contact details in contact entity

scriptLines: body as (currentPageNumber as short, data as (address1 as string, address2 as string, address3 as string, addressCode as integer, addressKey as string, addressName as string, addressNumber as short, appartmentNumber as short, city as string, company as short, country as string, countryCode as string, county as string, division as short, erpKey as string, fax as short, invoiceTo as boolean, latitude as string, longitude as string, phone as string, postalZipCode as integer, sequenceNumber as short, shipTo as boolean, soldTo as boolean, stateCode as string, status as string, web as string)[], more as boolean, nextPageNumber as short, pageSize as short, totalPages as short, totalRecords as short),

query: '<fetch>
  <entity name="customeraddress">
    <attribute name="customeraddressid" />
    <attribute name="eet_extendkey" />
    <attribute name="addressnumber" />
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="addressnumber" operator="eq" value="1" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetCustomerAddressIdFromCRM

body as (currentPageNumber as short, data as (buyFromBusinessPartner as string, cellNumber as string, company as short, contactCode as short, customerCode as string, customerName as string, department as string, designation as string, division as short, eXtendKey as string, eet_contactcode as string, eet_extendcompany as short, eet_syncwithextend as short, email as string, fax as string, firstName as string, fullName as string, invoiceFromBusinessPartner as string, invoiceToBusinessPartner as short, lastName as string, middleName as string, mobileNumber as string, payFromBusinessPartner as boolean, payToBusinessPartner as string, phone as string, shipFromBusinessPartner as string, shipToBusinessPartner as string, soldToBusinessPartner as short, statecode as short, title as string)[], more as boolean, nextPageNumber as short, pageSize as short, totalPages as short, totalRecords as short),

query: 'SELECT CustomerCode, ContactCode, FirstName AS firstname, LastName AS lastname, Email AS emailaddress1, 100 AS eet_extendcompany, 0 AS statecode,  concat(FirstName, \' \', LastName) AS fullname, concat(trim(CustomerCode), \'-\', trim(ContactCode)) AS eet_extendkey, substring(concat(trim(CustomerCode), \'-\', trim(ContactCode)),0,9) AS eet_contactcode, CompanyID from dimcontactbybusinesspartner WHERE trim(CompanyID) = \'01DEP\' and trim(FirstName) not like \'.%\'   AND CustomerCode not like \'.%\'     ',

query: 'SELECT CustomerCode, ContactCode, FirstName AS firstname, LastName AS lastname, Email AS emailaddress1, 100 AS eet_extendcompany, 0 AS statecode,  concat(FirstName, \' \', LastName) AS fullname, concat(trim(CustomerCode), \'-\', trim(ContactCode)) AS eet_extendkey, substring(concat(trim(CustomerCode), \'-\', trim(ContactCode)),0,9) AS eet_contactcode, CompanyID from dimcontactbybusinesspartner WHERE trim(CompanyID) = \'01DEM\' and trim(FirstName) not like \'.%\'   AND CustomerCode not like \'.%\'     ',

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <attribute name="productid" alias="eet_parentproductitemid"/>
       <attribute name="name" />
       <attribute name="eet_modelcode" />
       <filter>
           <condition attribute="eet_modelcode" operator="eq" value="C-99" />
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetProductFromCRM

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product" >
       <attribute name="productid" alias="eet_childproductitemid"/>
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="name" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <filter>
           <condition attribute="eet_modelcode" operator="eq" value="C-99" />
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="productid" />
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="name" alias="productname" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <filter type="and">
         
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
           <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="productid" />
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <filter type="and">
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
           <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct
query: 'SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(UnitNumber) Unit, TRIM(Manufacturer) Manufacturer FROM dimequipment WHERE trim(CompanyID)= \'01DEP\' AND trim(Manufacturer) <> \'\'',

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="productid" />
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <attribute name="eet_extendcompany" />
       <attribute name="eet_extendkey" />
       <filter type="and">
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
           <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
       <filter type="or">
        <condition attribute="producttypecode" operator="eq" value="200000" />
        <condition attribute="producttypecode" operator="eq" value="200001" />
      </filter>

   </entity>
</fetch>') ~> CrmProduct

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="productid" />
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="name" alias="productname" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <filter type="and">
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="eq" value="469038" />
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
           <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct

query: '<fetch>
   <entity name="product">
       <attribute name="productid" />
       <attribute name="productnumber" />
       <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
       <filter type="and">
           <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
           <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />
       </filter>
   </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct

query: 'SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(UnitNumber) Unit, ProductCategory, CompanyID FROM dimequipment WHERE ProductCategoryName IS NOT NULL AND ProductCategory IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ProductCategory) <> \'\' AND CompanyID = \'01DEP\' ',

query: '<fetch>
  <entity name="product">
    <attribute name="productid" />
    <attribute name="productnumber" />
    <attribute name="eet_unitnumber" />
    <attribute name="eet_extendcompany" />
    <attribute name="eet_extendkey" />

    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="eet_unitnumber" operator="not-null" />
      <condition attribute="productnumber" operator="not-null" />

      <filter type="or">
        <condition attribute="producttypecode" operator="eq" value="200000" />
        <condition attribute="producttypecode" operator="eq" value="200001" />
      </filter>

    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
') ~> GetproductIDfromProduct
